text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text:
The next scrimmage is a 1,800-meter turf run. The track is still a bit
damp from last night's rain, so we might see some unexpected results!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
One, two, three, four. Two, two, three, hey! Three, two, three, four.
Four, two, three, hey!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tannhauser is taking part in a scrimmage race today. Among her
opponents are the formidable Mihono Bourbon and Rice Shower.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hasn't made much of a name for herself yet, so there aren't many
cheers for her.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so Machitan's running today, I see! I heard that she did really
great in that special training session the other day.

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, and not only that, she even managed to keep up with Bourbon
and Rice in group sessions!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It would appear that word's getting out about our ambitious little
friend.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Machitan! Go for it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Stirred by Twin Turbo's hearty words of encouragement, cheers begin
to ring out from the stands.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wowie, now there's some pressure! All right, head in the game, me.
I'm gonna win this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Head held high after the boost from the crowd, Matikanetannhauser
heads for the starting gate.

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon with a five-... six-... seven-length lead! The fight for
second place is heating up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon prevails with a wide lead in the homestretch, and
Matikanetannhauser is unable to overtake Rice Shower for second
place.

text_block_list.name: Event Announcer
text_block_list.text: Mihono Bourbon is way out front! It's a landslide victory!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
I kind of thought that Machitan would, well... stand out a little bit
more than that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Amidst the thunderous applause for Mihono Bourbon, barely a word
escapes the mouths of those who had been cheering for my partner.
choice_data_list:
(I really thought we had it this time... I hope
she's okay.)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Sorry, Trainer. It looks like I still got a long ways to go.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if the mushy turf ended up hurting me a bit. I'll need to build
even more leg muscle... somehow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking about how disappointed Tannhauser must be, I resolve to
get back to the drawing board to build a new regimen. But then...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm feeling positively peckish right about now. Think I'll head to the
cafeteria! Ehe, wonder what I should get. Udon's sounding pretty
yummy, I think.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Time to dig in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We begin to eat lunch without one word about the morning's race. I
wonder if my concern is somewhat misplaced.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's up? You're kinda starin' off into space.
choice_data_list:
It's just that... I thought you might be feeling a
bit down...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Feeling down? Because of what?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess she's completely moved on. I choose my next words carefully
so as not to cause any undue stress.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so that's it! It's true that I was pretty disappointed right after the
race, but that means I just have to keep practicing and improving.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
So... yeah. No time to dwell on that when I could be dwelling on this
bowl of noodles instead. And on how to adjust my training plan, of
course!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, these carrot bits are dee-lish!
choice_data_list:
(How can she be acting so normal about all
this?)

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah, I get that.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hey, everyone! Whaddya get?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Pretty sure I get exactly what your trainer here's thinking. You were
probably wondering how she can act all normal after something like
that, right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Tannhauser's always the calmest of the bunch out on the track.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Surely you've never seen her cry or fuss when things don't go her way
during training, yes?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's certainly true, now that I think about it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ehe, I'm okay, I'm okay! My legs are just a little shaky. Looks like I've
still got work to do.

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Really? 'Cause you were pretty awesome up till those last three
hundred meters. You were right on her tail!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... huff... Ha... I don't... think sooo!

text_block_list.name: Robber A
text_block_list.text:
It's been almost twenty minutes straight of this. How is she not totally
exhausted by now?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's always acted really... normal.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: People don't seem to pick up on that about her. I doubt she's even thought that hard about it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wait... wait... Did you just compliment me?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
That's simply how she is, so please continue to look after our dear
friend.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oho, come on now. What are you two? My parents?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They might not be her parents, but they have shown me a little more
of Matikanetannhauser's hidden greatness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her tenacity seldom wavers, and that's a sort of strength few can
achieve.
